entry.value: {"version":1,"topBar":{"title":"Rick & Morty","subtitle":"Characters","visible":true},"banner":{"visible":false,"text":"","backgroundColor":"#6200EE","textColor":"#FFFFFF"},"card":{"imageShape":"circle","showStatusChip":true,"statusLabels":{"alive":"Alive","dead":"Dead","unknown":"Unknown"},"elevationDp":4},"emptyState":{"title":"No characters found","subtitle":"Pull down to refresh","visible":true},"errorView":{"title":"Something went wrong","retryLabel":"Try again"},"list":{"skeletonCount":6,"animationDurationMs":300}}
